get.description: Minimal public health probe. It verifies bootstrap completion, shutdown state, and PostgreSQL availability via Prisma without exposing dependency details.
Return a detailed health view for operators, including critical database status and placeholders for optional future dependencies such as Redis.

503.description: One or more critical dependencies are unavailable

post.description: Create a new user account and atomically bootstrap a personal workspace, admin membership, and workspace settings. A verification OTP will be sent to the provided email.

201.description: User registered successfully, verification email sent

post.description: Authenticate with email and password. User must have verified email and at least one active workspace membership. Returns workspace-aware access and refresh tokens. Web clients receive refresh token as HttpOnly cookie.
Verify email address using the 6-digit OTP sent to email. On success, returns workspace-aware tokens for auto-login. Web clients receive refresh token as HttpOnly cookie.

200.description: Email verified successfully, user logged in

post.description: Request a password reset OTP. Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.

200.description: Password reset email sent (if account exists)

post.description: Reset password using the 6-digit OTP. The OTP is verified and consumed in a single step. All active sessions will be terminated.

400.description: Invalid or expired reset code, or password validation failed

post.description: Get new access and refresh tokens while preserving active workspace context. The used refresh token is revoked (rotation). Web clients send refresh token via HttpOnly cookie; mobile clients send it in the request body.
Revoke the refresh token to logout from current device. Web clients send refresh token via HttpOnly cookie; mobile clients send it in the request body.
Revoke all refresh tokens to logout from all devices.

get.description: Get the profile of the currently authenticated user together with active workspace and membership context.

put.description: Upload a new avatar for the authenticated user. Replaces the previous avatar if one already exists.

422.description: Invalid file type or file too large

delete.description: Remove the current avatar for the authenticated user. Safe to call even when the user has no avatar.

post.description: Create a workspace-scoped account foundation record and, when compatible, one typed specialized profile. This surface intentionally excludes balances, transfers, reconciliation, and reporting math.

400.description: Invalid account payload or incompatible profile

403.description: Only workspace admins and members can create accounts

get.description: List only accounts that belong to the current principal workspace. Omitting the status filter returns only ACTIVE accounts.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional lifecycle filter. Defaults to ACTIVE when omitted.

get.description: Return a single account from the current workspace. Detail supports both ACTIVE and ARCHIVED records but never crosses workspace boundaries.

404.description: Account not found in the current workspace

patch.description: Update only mutable Accounts Core metadata: name, includeInReports, notes, and a compatible typed profile. Immutable lifecycle and financial seed fields are rejected explicitly.
Archive an account explicitly without mutating includeInReports or any downstream financial computations.
Return an archived account to ACTIVE explicitly while preserving independent metadata like includeInReports.

get.description: Return the authenticated user profile summary owned by UserProfile. This surface includes phone, countryCode, theme, and onboardingCompletedAt only.

patch.description: Update user-owned profile fields only. This route validates E.164 phone numbers, active countries, and theme values without mutating onboarding completion or workspace-scoped settings.

400.description: Invalid phone, inactive country, or invalid theme value

get.description: Return onboarding completion state only. This surface exposes onboardingCompletedAt and needsOnboarding without leaking profile-owned phone, theme, or countryCode fields.

patch.description: Update onboarding completion state only. Extra fields like phone, theme, or countryCode are rejected by request validation, and completion state is derived exclusively from onboardingCompletedAt.

400.description: Invalid onboarding payload or forbidden extra fields

get.description: Return active country reference rows only for onboarding and profile forms.
Return active currency reference rows only for workspace and onboarding flows.

Return only workspaces where the authenticated caller has active membership access. Each item includes workspace summary, membership summary, and whether it matches the current workspace from principal context.

200.description: Accessible workspaces for the authenticated caller

get.description: Return the active workspace summary, membership context, and shared workspace settings. This route is intentionally workspace-scoped and does NOT expose personal user preferences.

200.description: Current workspace summary and shared settings

patch.description: Update workspace identity fields for the active workspace, such as the visible name. Only workspace admins can mutate this surface.

403.description: Only workspace admins can update the workspace

get.description: Return only shared workspace settings for the active workspace. Personal preferences remain user-scoped in UserPreference and are NOT read or mutated by this surface.

patch.description: Update shared workspace settings for the active workspace. Only workspace admins can mutate this surface. Workspace identity fields like name belong to PATCH /workspaces/current, not here.

403.description: Only workspace admins can update shared workspace settings

get.description: Return only the current user preference overrides for the active workspace. Shared workspace settings and theme ownership are intentionally excluded from this surface.

200.description: Current user preference overrides for the active workspace

patch.description: Update only per-user-per-workspace preference overrides for the active workspace. Shared workspace settings and theme are not owned by this route and cannot be mutated here.

200.description: Current workspace personal preferences updated successfully

post.description: Analyze an uploaded voucher image and return structured extraction data or a NOT_VOUCHER outcome.

422.description: Invalid file type or invalid file content

password.description: User password (min 8 chars, must contain uppercase, lowercase, and number)

status.description: Membership status inside the current workspace

emailVerified.description: Whether the email has been verified

message.example: Registration successful. Please check your email to verify your account.

accessToken.description: JWT access token for API authentication

refreshToken.description: Refresh token for obtaining new access tokens

expiresIn.description: Access token expiration time in seconds

newPassword.description: New password (min 8 chars, must include uppercase, lowercase, and number)

refreshToken.description: Refresh token received during login or previous refresh. Required for mobile clients. Web clients can omit this and use the HttpOnly cookie instead.

file.description: Avatar image file (JPEG, PNG, or WebP, max 2MB).

name.description: Visible workspace name shared across the product

uiLocale.description: Preferred UI locale override for the current user in this workspace

dateFormat.description: Preferred date format override for the current user in this workspace

dashboardPreferences.description: Dashboard UI preferences owned by the current user in this workspace

reportPreferences.description: Report UI preferences owned by the current user in this workspace

transactionPreferences.description: Transaction UI preferences owned by the current user in this workspace

baseCurrencyCode.description: Workspace base currency code shared by all members

contentLocale.description: Workspace content locale shared by all members

monthStartDay.description: Day of month that starts the financial month

weekStartDay.description: Day of week that starts the calendar week (1-7)

file.description: Voucher image file (JPEG, PNG, or WebP, max 5MB).

confidence.description: Confidence score between 0 and 1 for top-level classification.

text.description: Human-readable voucher text when derivable from the model output. Null when only structured fields are available or no reliable text was extracted.

model.description: Requested model or route used by the capability.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings returned by the analysis pipeline.
